'''dhosazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biasterionic|biasterionic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biasterionic|biasterionic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhosazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhosazithi|dhosazithi]] || [[word:dhosaziji|dhosaziji]] || [[word:dhosazishi|dhosazishi]] || [[word:dhosaziki|dhosaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhosazuthuthu|dhosazuthuthu]] || [[word:dhosazujuju|dhosazujuju]] || [[word:dhosazushushu|dhosazushushu]] || [[word:dhosazukuku|dhosazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhosazuthu|dhosazuthu]] || [[word:dhosazuju|dhosazuju]] || [[word:dhosazushu|dhosazushu]] || [[word:dhosazuku|dhosazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhosazufthuf|dhosazufthuf]] || [[word:dhosazufjuf|dhosazufjuf]] || [[word:dhosazufshuf|dhosazufshuf]] || [[word:dhosazufkuf|dhosazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhosazethe|dhosazethe]] || [[word:dhosazeje|dhosazeje]] || [[word:dhosazeshe|dhosazeshe]] || [[word:dhosazeke|dhosazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhosazothotho|dhosazothotho]] || [[word:dhosazojojo|dhosazojojo]] || [[word:dhosazoshosho|dhosazoshosho]] || [[word:dhosazokoko|dhosazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhosazotho|dhosazotho]] || [[word:dhosazojo|dhosazojo]] || [[word:dhosazosho|dhosazosho]] || [[word:dhosazoko|dhosazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhosazofthof|dhosazofthof]] || [[word:dhosazofjof|dhosazofjof]] || [[word:dhosazofshof|dhosazofshof]] || [[word:dhosazofkof|dhosazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhosazïfthïf|dhosazïfthïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfjïf|dhosazïfjïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfshïf|dhosazïfshïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfkïf|dhosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhosazïfthïfthïf|dhosazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfjïfjïf|dhosazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfshïfshïf|dhosazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfkïfkïf|dhosazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhosazïfthïf|dhosazïfthïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfjïf|dhosazïfjïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfshïf|dhosazïfshïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfkïf|dhosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhosazïfthïf|dhosazïfthïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfjïf|dhosazïfjïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfshïf|dhosazïfshïf]] || [[word:dhosazïfkïf|dhosazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhosazæthæ|dhosazæthæ]] || [[word:dhosazæjæ|dhosazæjæ]] || [[word:dhosazæshæ|dhosazæshæ]] || [[word:dhosazækæ|dhosazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhosazathatha|dhosazathatha]] || [[word:dhosazajaja|dhosazajaja]] || [[word:dhosazashasha|dhosazashasha]] || [[word:dhosazakaka|dhosazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhosazatha|dhosazatha]] || [[word:dhosazaja|dhosazaja]] || [[word:dhosazasha|dhosazasha]] || [[word:dhosazaka|dhosazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhosazafthaf|dhosazafthaf]] || [[word:dhosazafjaf|dhosazafjaf]] || [[word:dhosazafshaf|dhosazafshaf]] || [[word:dhosazafkaf|dhosazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhosazasha|dhosazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhosazshësha|dhosazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhosazrosha|dhosazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhosazmusha|dhosazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhosazyasha|dhosazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhosaznkshësha|godhosaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhosaznkrosha|godhosaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhosaznkmusha|godhosaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhosaznkyasha|godhosaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhosasazasha|dhosasazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhosasazshësha|dhosasazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhosasazrosha|dhosasazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhosasazmusha|dhosasazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhosasazyasha|dhosasazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhosasaznkshësha|godhosasaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhosasaznkrosha|godhosasaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhosasaznkmusha|godhosasaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhosasaznkyasha|godhosasaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhesæzasha|dhesæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhesæzshësha|dhesæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhesæzrosha|dhesæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhesæzmusha|dhesæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhesæzyasha|dhesæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhesæznkshësha|godhesæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhesæznkrosha|godhesæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhesæznkmusha|godhesæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhesæznkyasha|godhesæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhosfazasha|dhosfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhosfazshësha|dhosfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhosfazrosha|dhosfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhosfazmusha|dhosfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhosfazyasha|dhosfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhosfaznkshësha|godhosfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhosfaznkrosha|godhosfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhosfaznkmusha|godhosfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhosfaznkyasha|godhosfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
